message:
test(asserts): [7k7pl batch 6] pin storage source/timestamp/day-histogram content

Upgrade 5 presence-only assertions across storage and parity tests
to pin the exact content and shape that the tests seed, so
regressions producing valid-but-wrong output fail loudly.

- storage.rs (upsert_and_get_source): replace
  `config_json.is_some()` / `created_at.is_some()` /
  `updated_at.is_some()` with exact-match JSON round-trip +
  ms-epoch plausibility (>= 2001-09-09) + `updated_at >= created_at`.
- storage.rs (daily_stats_histogram): collapse `.is_some()` +
  `.unwrap().sessions == N` into a single `assert_eq!(map, Some(N))`
  for both day 0 and day 2.
- storage.rs (timeline_json_includes_source_id_field): replace
  `!result.is_empty()` with `assert_eq!(result.len(), 1)` — the
  test seeds exactly one conversation; duplicate-insert or leaked-
  state regressions would otherwise slip past.
- storage_frankensqlite_parity.rs (parity_migration_creates_local_source):
  replace dual `.is_some()` with `.expect()` + pin both ids to
  the well-known "local" value, catching regressions that rename
  the id.
- storage_frankensqlite_parity.rs (transition_rusqlite_db_readable_
  by_frankenstorage_basic): pin `src.id == "local"` after
  transition, catching rename regressions.

Verified green across all 5 affected tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
